data.title: Ark Invest's Brett Winton Explains Why Betting Markets Favor Trump Over Kamala Harris, While Polls Show Otherwise
data.description: Winton highlighted that prediction markets have often diverged from polls-based approaches, with a significant portion of these deviations favoring Democratic odds.

data.title: This Global Payments Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Tuesday
Jim Cramer Calls AST SpaceMobile 'Overvalued,' Warns HubSpot Is 'Playing With Fire'
data.description: Cheniere Energy (LNG) is a buy, while GE Vernova (GEV) may sell off on good news. HubSpot (HUBS) is risky, NuScale Power (SMR) is losing money, and AST SpaceMobile (ASTS) is overvalued.

data.title: Harris Vs. Trump: Vice President Edges Out Rival In Latest Poll, But Voters Favor Ex-President's Stance On Economy And Immigration
data.description: The poll, conducted over six days, shows a tight race with Harris maintaining a slight edge similar to a previous poll.
